product.name: mailc
product.tagline: The modern email compiler that speaks your language.
product.previewText: Introducing mailc — compile beautiful, responsive emails from clean markup. Now in public beta.
product.ctaSubtext: No credit card required · Works in every email client
product.finalCtaCopy: Join 12,000+ developers who ship pixel-perfect emails in minutes, not hours. Zero config. Browser and Node.js.
product.address: Building the future of email, one compile at a time.

stats.featuredLine: Used by engineers at Vercel · Resend · Postmark · Buttondown · Loops

features.title: Blazing fast compilation
features.description: Compiles a full newsletter in under 5ms.

features.title: Tailwind-style classes
features.description: Write bg-purple-600, text-sm, p-4 — we expand to email-safe inline CSS at compile time.

features.title: Responsive by default
features.description: Every component outputs fluid-hybrid HTML. Works in Gmail, Outlook, Apple Mail, and 50+ clients.

features.title: Component-based authoring
features.description: mc-section, mc-column, mc-button, mc-image — clean semantic markup that compiles to battle-tested table HTML.

features.title: Dark mode support
features.description: Automatic dark mode meta tags and color-scheme declarations. Your emails look great everywhere.

features.title: Template engine built in
features.description: Variables, loops, conditionals — all resolved at compile time. No runtime dependencies.

pricing.billingNote: No credit card required to start. Cancel anytime.
pricing.footerNote: All plans include a 14-day Pro trial. No lock-in. Pause or cancel anytime.

testimonials.quote: mailc replaced our entire email toolchain. We went from 45 minutes per template to 5 minutes. The compiler output is cleaner than hand-written HTML.
testimonials.name: Sarah Chen

testimonials.quote: Finally, an email tool that doesn't make me want to quit programming. The Tailwind-style classes are genius.
testimonials.name: Marcus Webb

testimonials.quote: We compile 200k transactional emails per day with mailc. It's rock solid and the output renders perfectly in Outlook.
testimonials.name: Priya Sharma

faqs.question: Does mailc work in the browser?
faqs.answer: Yes! mailc ships ESM and IIFE browser bundles. Use it from a CDN, in a bundler, or server-side with Node.js.

faqs.question: What email clients are supported?
faqs.answer: All of them. Gmail, Outlook (all versions), Apple Mail, Yahoo, AOL, Samsung Mail, and 50+ more. We test against caniemail.com data.

footer.sentTo: You're receiving this because you signed up at mailcraft.dev
